entities.label: Achilles injury
entities.description: An injury to the Achilles tendon, which can cause negative talk and doubt about recovery.

entities.label: Rehab
entities.description: The process of physical rehabilitation to recover from the Achilles injury.

entities.label: Calf strength
entities.description: Regaining strength in the calf muscle is a key goal in the rehab process.

entities.label: Return to the court
entities.description: The ultimate goal of the rehab process is to return to playing basketball.

entities.label: Electrical stimulation
entities.description: A technique used in rehab to stimulate nerves and contract muscles, helping to re-educate nerves in the calf.

entities.label: Negative talk
entities.description: Negative comments and doubts surrounding the Achilles injury and the possibility of full recovery.

entities.label: Mental fortitude
entities.description: The mental strength and determination needed to overcome the challenges of recovery.

entities.label: Frustration
entities.description: Feelings of frustration experienced during the recovery process.

entities.label: Jason Han
entities.description: Someone the injured person wants to be able to beat again after recovery.

relationships.evidence: There's all this negative talk around the Achilles injury and people are like, 'You'll never be back.'
Started gaining strength back in your calf.
Electrical stimulation stimulates the nerves that contract the muscle. Try to help re-educate those nerves to the calf.
Which will build up your calf faster.
There were times where he would be in the shower early on and I would swear he's about to come through the wall.
When he's confronted with a challenge, he wants to attack it.
Six weeks, I'm confident you're go back and beat Jason Han the way you were before.
